symbols: overflowing garden — abundance and the flourishing of creation, evoking the Garden of Eden
table with bread — provision, sustenance, and the simple gifts of daily life
enclosed garden — resonates with the hortus conclusus, a symbol of paradise and sacred enclosure
description: A surrealist painting depicting a room that has been entirely overtaken by lush vegetation. The interior walls, furniture, and doorways are engulfed by climbing vines, flowering bushes, fruit trees bearing oranges, and dense foliage. At center, a small table with a white cloth holds what appears to be bread or fruit. Through windows, a pale sky is visible. A cat sleeps in a cradle-like object to the right. The overall effect is of paradise bursting through the boundaries of a domestic space, blurring the line between indoors and the natural world.
